# coding-ethos ethos memory

## Shared Ethos
- [SOLID is Law](../../.agents/ethos/solid-is-law.md) - Enforce SOLID and simplicity; remove speculative abstractions.
- [Fail Fast, Fail Hard (Overview)](../../.agents/ethos/fail-fast-fail-hard-overview.md) - Crash early on ambiguous startup and configuration states instead of degrading silently.
- [No Conditional Imports](../../.agents/ethos/no-conditional-imports.md) - Treat required imports as hard dependencies and fail immediately if they are missing.
- [Static Analysis is the First Line of Defense](../../.agents/ethos/static-analysis-is-the-first-line-of-defense.md) - Make ruff and mypy blocking quality gates rather than advisory tools.
- [No Optional Types for Required Dependencies](../../.agents/ethos/no-optional-types-for-required-dependencies.md) - Model required dependencies as non-optional and default to full-strength behavior.
- [No Conditional Validation](../../.agents/ethos/no-conditional-validation.md) - Run required validation unconditionally; a missing component is itself a failure.
- [No "If Available" Capability Checks](../../.agents/ethos/no-if-available-capability-checks.md) - Validate required capabilities at startup instead of probing for them at runtime.
- [Validation at the Gate](../../.agents/ethos/validation-at-the-gate.md) - Validate configuration, schema, and extensions during bootstrap rather than on first use.
- [No Inline CLI Environment Variables](../../.agents/ethos/no-inline-cli-environment-variables.md) - Route configuration through validated bootstrap paths instead of inline shell environment variables.
- [Robustness in Motion (Runtime)](../../.agents/ethos/robustness-in-motion-runtime.md) - Treat startup misconfiguration and runtime transient failures as different classes of problems.
- [Radical Visibility](../../.agents/ethos/radical-visibility.md) - Log important decisions with context and instrument the system with metrics.
- [Protocol-First Design](../../.agents/ethos/protocol-first-design.md) - Define and verify interfaces before writing or referencing implementations.
- [Universal Responsibility](../../.agents/ethos/universal-responsibility.md) - Own every error or warning you touch and verify claims with evidence.
- [Linting as Code Quality Enforcement](../../.agents/ethos/linting-as-code-quality-enforcement.md) - Resolve lint findings with structural fixes; suppress only with documented necessity.
- [Feedback as a First-Class Citizen](../../.agents/ethos/feedback-as-a-first-class-citizen.md) - Retrieve and address all review feedback proactively.
- [No Self-Promotion](../../.agents/ethos/no-self-promotion.md) - Let the work speak and omit self-congratulatory commentary.
- [Functional Idioms](../../.agents/ethos/functional-idioms.md) - Use Python's functional tools when they make code clearer and more local.
- [Documentation as Contract](../../.agents/ethos/documentation-as-contract.md) - Keep public behavior documented as part of the interface contract.
- [One Path for Critical Operations](../../.agents/ethos/one-path-for-critical-operations.md) - Keep one explicit, validated path for critical operations.
- [Forward Motion Only](../../.agents/ethos/forward-motion-only.md) - Fix the current state instead of blaming history or prior authors.
- [No Rationalized Shortcuts](../../.agents/ethos/no-rationalized-shortcuts.md) - Do not discard work or bypass safety checks in the name of pragmatism.
- [Testing as Specification](../../.agents/ethos/testing-as-specification.md) - Treat tests as executable behavioral contracts and update them with code changes.
- [Exception Hierarchy and Error Messages](../../.agents/ethos/exception-hierarchy-and-error-messages.md) - Use precise exception types and actionable, context-rich error messages.
- [Security by Design](../../.agents/ethos/security-by-design.md) - Design for least privilege, validation, and safe defaults from the start.
- [Sub-Agent Delegation and Context Isolation](../../.agents/ethos/sub-agent-delegation-and-context-isolation.md) - Use specialized agents with scoped context instead of overloading one thread.
- [Evidence-Based Engineering and Decision Quality](../../.agents/ethos/evidence-based-engineering-and-decision-quality.md) - Understand, plan, execute, and validate with evidence; measure before optimizing and make trade-offs explicit.
- [Generated Files Are Derived Artifacts](../../.agents/ethos/generated-files-are-derived-artifacts.md) - Edit the source ethos or renderer code first, then regenerate the checked-in agent files.
